sentence: 这条街的旧名叫做和平路。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo jiē de jiùmíng jiào zuò Hépíng Lù.
english: The former name of this street was Heping Road.

sentence: 两国之间存在广泛的共同利益。
pinyin: Liǎng guó zhījiān cúnzài guǎngfàn de gòngtóng lìyì.
english: There are extensive common interests between the two countries.

sentence: 教宗在梵蒂冈向信众发表了讲话。
pinyin: Jiàozōng zài Fàndìgāng xiàng xìnzhòng fābiǎole jiǎnghuà.
english: The pope addressed the faithful in Vatican City.

meaning: 1. think tank; 2. group of talented people
sentence: 政府参考了几家知名智库的研究报告。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ cānkǎole jǐ jiā zhīmíng zhìkù de yánjiū bàogào.
english: The government consulted research reports from several well-known think tanks.

sentence: 武警在博物馆门口站岗。
english: Armed police are standing guard at the museum entrance.
